name: ratified decisions (ADR index)
description: AI features are typed agents in @resonance/ai via the AI-SDK-v6 Gateway + typed agent/tool registry; durable workflows deferred. Open ADR-0009 only when changing agent architecture.

name: structured runner = forced single tool call
description: runAgentStructured forces the tool call (toolChoice:'required') and stops after one step (stopWhen: stepCountIs(1)) so the tool executes once with no extra closing model turn; it reads result.toolResults.at(-1).output as the agent's Output. Throws AgentError when there are no tools, the required tool wasn't called, or generation failed. The tool handler is the source of Output (e.g. profile-gen's saveProfile returns {profileId}). Context-dependent tools use the factory seam defineProfileGenAgent({userId, currentRoles, db, embedder}) that closes over server state — the registry handler type stays (input)=>Promise<...>.
